mentions.note: Jetro acquisition ($21.6B + shares) natural bolt-on for restaurant supply scale and food service distribution. 15x earnings, 3% yield. Market oversold; synergies + closed deal = re-rating in 6 months.

Jetro Restaurant Depot acquisition unlocks 20% revenue growth, 55% FCF growth; complementary cash-and-carry and delivery models; natural evolution for restaurant customers; great opportunity to buy after sell-off.
